fix.summary: Before creating or enabling any shared Phase 7 readiness signal script, fail closed unless aws is already available or yum install -y awscli succeeds. Validate the bootstrap precedes both CloudFormation SignalResource and ECS DescribeContainerInstances. Record KeyboardInterrupt as a failed verdict while retaining finally cleanup.
appliesTo: strict Phase 7 collector, HAProxy, consumer and ClickHouse capacity hosts

exactTargetedSynth.firstInvocationRejectedBeforeSynthesis: LOOP_AD_REGION was omitted from the local shell; the exact-environment invocation then passed. No AWS request or mutation occurred.

realAwsVerification.nextProbe: A fresh promotion-ineligible targeted archive attempt must prove yum can install awscli when absent, both readiness signals complete, 15M archive equivalence passes, source remains, and cleanup returns to authoritative zero.
